name: Dashboard Server
description: Asyncio HTTP server that serves the Baton dashboard API endpoints and static UI files. Provides REST API for circuit snapshots, topology, signal data, and signal statistics.

types.name: DashboardServer

fields.name: _adapters
fields.description: Dictionary of adapter instances keyed by name

fields.name: _circuit
fields.description: Circuit specification with nodes and edges

fields.name: _signal_aggregator
fields.description: Optional signal aggregator for signal data collection

fields.name: _static_dir
fields.description: Path to static file directory for UI serving

fields.name: _host
fields.description: Host address to bind server to

fields.name: _port
fields.description: Port number to bind server to

types.description: HTTP server class for Baton dashboard API and static UI serving

functions.name: __init__
functions.description: Initialize DashboardServer with adapters, circuit state/spec, optional signal aggregator, static directory, and server binding configuration
postconditions: self._adapters is set to adapters parameter
self._state is set to state parameter
self._circuit is set to circuit parameter
self._signal_aggregator is set to signal_aggregator parameter
self._static_dir is Path(static_dir) if static_dir else None
self._host is set to host parameter
self._port is set to port parameter
self._server is initialized to None

functions.name: is_running
functions.description: Property that checks if the server is currently running by verifying _server exists and is serving
postconditions: Returns True if _server is not None and _server.is_serving() is True
Returns False otherwise

functions.name: start
functions.description: Start the asyncio dashboard server, binding to configured host and port, and log the startup

error_cases.name: OSError
error_cases.condition: When port is already in use or binding fails

error_cases.name: PermissionError
error_cases.condition: When insufficient permissions to bind to port

postconditions: self._server is set to an asyncio.Server instance
Server is listening on self._host:self._port
Log message is written indicating server address

structured_side_effects.description: Starts TCP server on configured host:port
Logs info message about server listening

functions.name: stop
functions.description: Stop the dashboard server if running, close connections, and wait for graceful shutdown
postconditions: If _server was not None: server is closed and connections are terminated
self._server is set to None

structured_side_effects.description: Closes TCP server and waits for connections to close

functions.name: _handle
functions.description: Handle incoming HTTP request by parsing method and path, routing to appropriate handler, and writing response. Implements timeout and error handling.

error_cases.name: TimeoutError
error_cases.condition: When reading request line takes longer than 5 seconds

error_cases.name: GenericException
error_cases.condition: Any exception during request handling is caught, logged, and suppressed

postconditions: HTTP response is written to writer
writer is closed
Request is routed to appropriate handler based on method and path

structured_side_effects.description: Reads HTTP request and writes HTTP response

functions.name: _handle_snapshot
functions.description: Collect dashboard snapshot data by calling dashboard.collect() and return as JSON string
postconditions: Returns JSON string representation of dashboard snapshot
Snapshot contains data from adapters, state, and circuit

functions.name: _handle_topology
functions.description: Extract circuit topology (nodes and edges) from circuit specification and return as JSON string

error_cases.name: AttributeError
error_cases.condition: When circuit nodes or edges lack expected attributes

error_cases.name: JSONEncodeError
error_cases.condition: When json.dumps() fails to encode topology data

postconditions: Returns JSON string with 'nodes' array containing name, port, role, host for each node
Returns JSON string with 'edges' array containing source, target, label for each edge

functions.name: _handle_signals
functions.description: Query signal aggregator for last N signals and return as JSON array. Returns empty array if no aggregator configured.

inputs.name: last_n
inputs.description: Number of recent signals to retrieve

error_cases.name: JSONEncodeError
error_cases.condition: When json.dumps() fails to encode signals

postconditions: If _signal_aggregator is None: returns '[]'
If _signal_aggregator exists: returns JSON array of last_n signals with model_dump() applied to each

functions.name: _handle_signal_stats
functions.description: Query signal aggregator for per-path statistics and return as JSON object with computed metrics. Returns empty object if no aggregator configured.

error_cases.name: AttributeError
error_cases.condition: When signal_aggregator.path_stats() fails or stats lack expected attributes

error_cases.name: JSONEncodeError
error_cases.condition: When json.dumps() fails to encode stats

postconditions: If _signal_aggregator is None: returns '{}'
If _signal_aggregator exists: returns JSON object with path keys and stats values
Each stat includes path, count, avg_latency_ms (rounded to 2 decimals), error_count, error_rate (rounded to 4 decimals)

functions.name: _handle_static
functions.description: Serve static files from configured static directory with path traversal protection. Defaults to index.html for root path.

error_cases.name: OSError
error_cases.condition: When file read fails due to permissions or I/O error

error_cases.name: UnicodeDecodeError
error_cases.condition: When path contains invalid unicode characters

postconditions: If _static_dir is None: writes 404 JSON error response
If path is / or empty: resolves to /index.html
If path contains directory traversal: writes 403 JSON error response
If file does not exist or is directory: writes 404 JSON error response
If file exists: writes 200 response with file content and guessed MIME type
Response is written to writer

structured_side_effects.description: Reads static file content from disk
Writes HTTP response with file content

functions.name: _write_json_response
functions.description: Write HTTP JSON response with given status code and body to stream writer. Includes CORS header and standard HTTP response formatting.

error_cases.name: UnicodeEncodeError
error_cases.condition: When body contains characters that cannot be encoded as UTF-8

postconditions: HTTP response is written to writer with status line
Content-Type is set to application/json
Access-Control-Allow-Origin is set to *
Content-Length matches body byte length
Connection is set to close
Body is written as UTF-8 encoded bytes

structured_side_effects.description: Writes HTTP response headers and body

invariants: If _server is not None, it represents an active or closed asyncio.Server instance
If _static_dir is not None, it is a Path object
_host and _port define the server binding configuration
GET requests to unknown API paths return 404
GET requests to non-API paths attempt static file serving
All JSON responses include CORS header Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *
Static file serving includes directory traversal protection
